page_metadata.bioconda__summary: bustools is a program for manipulating BUS files for single cell RNA-Seq datasets.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: bustools is a program for manipulating BUS files for single cell RNA-Seq datasets. It can be used to error correct barcodes, collapse UMIs, produce gene count or transcript compatibility count matrices, and is useful for many other tasks.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: > COMMON LINK WITH (PUB. & NAME DIFFERENT) bio.tools/pymzml (GITHUB.COM) | > CORRECT NAME OF TOOL COULD ALSO BE 'BUStools suite', 'BUStools suite tools', 'BUS' (bio.tools/bus), 'kallisto' (bio.tools/kallisto) | The Barcode, UMI, Set format and BUStools | Materials associated with the manuscript "The Barcode, UMI, Set format and BUStools" by Páll Melsted, Vasilis Ntranos and Lior Pachter | Tools for working with BUS files | R vignettes for processing BUS format single-cell RNA-seq files
